Arjany Martha.note: Curaçao's quick right-side outlet, useful for fresh carries and stretching defenders after turnovers.
Arjany Martha.noteZh: 阿尔贾尼·马尔塔是库拉索快速的右路出口，适合在转换后带球推进并拉扯防守人。

Armando Obispo.note: Curaçao's composed centre-back, giving them left-footed exits, aerial cover, and a higher defensive ceiling.
Armando Obispo.noteZh: 阿曼多·奥比斯波是库拉索沉稳中卫，能提供左脚出球、空中覆盖和更高的防守上限。

Brandley Kuwas.note: Curaçao's veteran wide creator, dangerous when he can cross early or shape set pieces from the right.
Brandley Kuwas.noteZh: 布兰德利·库瓦斯是库拉索老练的边路创造者，能早早传中，也能从右路处理定位球。

Deveron Fonville.note: Curaçao's young defensive option, bringing recovery legs and calm cover behind the senior centre-backs.
Deveron Fonville.noteZh: 德韦龙·丰维尔是库拉索年轻防守选择，能在资深中卫身后提供回追能力和冷静保护。

Eloy Room.note: Curaçao's experienced goalkeeper, trusted for reaction saves and command when the box gets crowded.
Eloy Room.noteZh: 埃洛伊·鲁姆是库拉索经验丰富的门将，在禁区拥挤时能提供反应扑救和指挥。

Gervane Kastaneer.note: Curaçao's powerful wide runner, useful for direct carries and forcing defenders to turn toward their own goal.
Gervane Kastaneer.noteZh: 热尔瓦内·卡斯塔内尔是库拉索力量型边路跑动点，能直接带球并迫使后卫转身回追。

Godfried Roemeratoe.note: Curaçao's defensive midfield screen, helping protect the back line and keep possession moving cleanly.
Godfried Roemeratoe.noteZh: 戈德弗里德·鲁梅拉托是库拉索防守型中场屏障，能保护防线并让控球顺畅流动。

Jearl Margaritha.note: Curaçao's goal-minded left winger, able to attack space, drive inside, and give the front line more speed.
Jearl Margaritha.noteZh: 杰尔·马尔加里塔是库拉索有进球意识的左边锋，能冲击空间、内切推进，并给锋线增加速度。

Jeremy Antonisse.note: Curaçao's left-side accelerator, useful for counters, inside cuts, and changing the tempo wide.
Jeremy Antonisse.noteZh: 杰里米·安东尼斯是库拉索左路加速点，适合反击、内切和在边路改变节奏。

Joshua Brenet.note: Curaçao's experienced right-back, giving them overlaps, recovery speed, and steadier wide defending.
Joshua Brenet.noteZh: 约书亚·布雷内特是库拉索经验型右后卫，能提供套边、回追速度和更稳定的边路防守。

Juergen Locadia.note: Curaçao's physical striker option, giving them hold-up touches and a direct target when pressure builds.
Juergen Locadia.noteZh: 于尔根·洛卡迪亚是库拉索身体型中锋选择，在压力上升时能提供背身做球和直接支点。

Juninho Bacuna.note: Curaçao's midfield driver, able to carry through contact and threaten from distance or restarts.
Juninho Bacuna.noteZh: 朱尼尼奥·巴库纳是库拉索中场推进器，能带球穿过对抗，并用远射或定位球制造威胁。

Jurien Gaari.note: Curaçao's rugged centre-back cover, useful for aerial duels and late defensive protection.
Jurien Gaari.noteZh: 尤里恩·加里是库拉索强硬的中卫保障，适合空中对抗和后段防守保护。

Kenji Gorre.note: Curaçao's wide dribbler, bringing quick feet, left-side creativity, and combination play near the box.
Kenji Gorre.noteZh: 肯吉·戈雷是库拉索边路盘带手，能在禁区附近带来快脚、左路创造和配合。

Kevin Felida.note: Curaçao's midfield cover option, useful for second balls, short passes, and protecting central space.
Kevin Felida.noteZh: 凯文·费利达是库拉索中场保护选择，能争第二落点、短传，并守住中路空间。

Leandro Bacuna.note: Curaçao's senior leader, able to cover multiple roles and shape games with set pieces and experience.
Leandro Bacuna.noteZh: 莱安德罗·巴库纳是库拉索资深领袖，能覆盖多个位置，并用定位球和经验影响比赛。

Livano Comenencia.note: Curaçao's young right-back engine, giving them forward support and enough recovery speed behind it.
Livano Comenencia.noteZh: 利瓦诺·科梅嫩西亚是库拉索年轻右后卫发动机，能提供前插支援，并有足够回追速度补身后。

Riechedly Bazoer.note: Curaçao's ball-playing defensive piece, comfortable stepping into midfield and passing through pressure.
Riechedly Bazoer.noteZh: 里谢德利·巴佐尔是库拉索会出球的防守棋子，能前顶到中场并穿过压力传球。

Roshon van Eijma.note: Curaçao's centre-back organizer, useful for marking, aerial cover, and keeping the line connected.
Roshon van Eijma.noteZh: 罗申·范艾马是库拉索中卫组织者，能盯人、空中覆盖，并保持防线连接。

Sherel Floranus.note: Curaçao's left-back stabilizer, helping balance the flank and recover when attacks break down.
Sherel Floranus.noteZh: 谢雷尔·弗洛拉努斯是库拉索左后卫稳定点，能平衡边路，并在进攻中断后回追补防。

Shurandy Sambo.note: Curaçao's explosive right-back, able to overlap with power and still fight through one-on-one defending.
Shurandy Sambo.noteZh: 舒兰迪·桑博是库拉索爆发型右后卫，能强力套边，也能完成一对一防守。

Sontje Hansen.note: Curaçao's sharp right winger, useful for quick feet, final-third spark, and slipping away from tight markers.
Sontje Hansen.noteZh: 松杰·汉森是库拉索敏捷的右边锋，能用快脚、前场火花和摆脱紧盯防守来制造威胁。

Tahith Chong.note: Curaçao's high-profile winger, bringing left-footed carries, positional flexibility, and top-league experience.
Tahith Chong.noteZh: 塔希特·钟是库拉索最受关注的边锋，能带来左脚推进、位置灵活性和顶级联赛经验。

Trevor Doornbusch.note: Curaçao's goalkeeper depth, giving them a tall shot-stopper and cover behind Room.
Trevor Doornbusch.noteZh: 特雷弗·多恩布施是库拉索门将深度，在鲁姆身后提供高大扑救选择和保障。

Tyrese Noslin.note: Curaçao's right-side runner, useful for carrying forward and supporting midfield pressure on the flank.
Tyrese Noslin.noteZh: 泰里斯·诺斯林是库拉索右路跑动点，能向前带球，并在边路支援中场压迫。

Tyrick Bodak.note: Curaçao's young goalkeeper cover, adding reaction saves and long-term depth to the squad.
Tyrick Bodak.noteZh: 泰里克·博达克是库拉索年轻门将保障，能提供反应扑救和长期深度。
